dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The system achieved 100% schema validation success across all reasoning spans. Both critical governance steps—the rules-context-loader and the alignment-engine—executed without errors, ensuring strict adherence to the defined architectural framework and constraints.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Causal integrity is high. The architecture-work-to-evolution-map utilized 54,781 tokens, reflecting a deep contextual analysis of state changes. This complexity exceeded the previous baseline of 54,427 tokens while maintaining successful downstream intent generation.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment engine processed 30,688 tokens to resolve trade-offs. While slightly below the baseline token count of 31,130, the successful schema validation and alignment report generation indicate effective reconciliation of architectural tensions.
